name: Shoky
description: The Shoky is a Bandit SMG from a fixed-element set, always spawning with a Maliwan barrel that gives it much better status chance, damage over time, and accuracy than a normal Bandit SMG. Because the parts are locked, it appears far less often than its rarity suggests and is easy to overlook. Even so, its elemental performance is strong enough to carry fights well beyond what its color tier implies.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. It only appears at green rarity or higher. Related Bandit SMGs with the same fixed Maliwan barrel include Barfy for corrosive, Burny for incendiary, and Slagy for slag. Maliwan-made SMGs using this barrel are much more common and can roll from white through purple.
